text:
On Wed, Sep 05, 2001 at 02:20:01AM -0700, Sheldon Hearn wrote:
> 
>  On Wed, 05 Sep 2001 03:06:34 +0900, "Akinori MUSHA" wrote:
>  
>  > I suppose they should be added prior to (or along with) exim then.
>  
>  I agree.  I think the major MTAs should be on the first CD, along with
>  Apache (and probably apache-ssl too).

There's a little problem with that: we do not package qmail because
of the weird DJB license or maybe the lack thereof.

G'luck,
Peter

-- 
This sentence was in the past tense.
